betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fissile Materials§f from §bGas Centrifuges§f or fuel reprocessing enable nuclear weapons.

§eSources:§f
• §bGas Centrifuge§f uranium enrichment
• §bPUREX§f fuel reprocessing
• §bChicago Pile§f plutonium breeding

§eCritical Materials:§f
• §bUranium-235§f (enriched)
• §bPlutonium-239§f (bred)
• Other fissile isotopes

§eApplications:§f
• Nuclear bomb cores
• Advanced reactor fuels
• Fusion plasma fuel

§aTip:§f The gateway to nuclear weapons - handle with appropriate caution.
